{{Quote|All combat personnel standing by.|Missile Destroyer captain|<ref name="Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''</ref>}}
'''Missile Destroyers''' were aquatic [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] that were used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as the anti-air units in its aquatic [[Imperial Navy/Legends|navy]]. They could be upgraded with further armaments and armor.

==History==
They typically patrolled the seas around [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] installations, accompanied by [[Scout (Galactic Empire)|Imperial scout frigates]] serving as escort vessels, in order to protect against surprise attacks from [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] or [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]].

{{Gamemechanics}}
Missile Destroyers under the command of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] were used during the [[Reytha campaign]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].
{{Endgame}}

{{Veh-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Missile Destroyers appear in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and its [[2002]] expansion pack [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']]. They may be built during the Galactic Empire campaign or in multiplayer.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''
